query: Plot on the map the FAIR1M, BigEarthNet, and xView1 images in Greece from 2nd half of 2012

task0.objective: Fetch images from the FAIR1M dataset in Greece from the 2nd half of 2012.

task1.objective: Fetch images from the BigEarthNet dataset in Greece from the 2nd half of 2012.

task2.objective: Fetch images from the xView1 dataset in Greece from the 2nd half of 2012.

task3.objective: Plot the fetched images from FAIR1M, BigEarthNet, and xView1 on the map.
